varlistentry.term: Member FOnlineChatAccelByte::CreateRoom (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FChatRoomId &RoomId, const FString &Nickname, const FChatRoomConfig &ChatRoomConfig) override

listitem.para: Manual room creation is deprecated - please use V2 Sessions to auto-create chat rooms!

varlistentry.term: Member FOnlineChatAccelByte::CreateRoom (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FString &Nickname, const FAccelByteChatRoomConfig &ChatRoomConfig)

listitem.para: Manual room creation is deprecated - please use V2 Sessions to auto-create chat rooms!
